mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, app_code, app_name, app_type, suite_code, object_code, entry_mode, entry_url, config_key, icon, description, status, sort_order, options, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time

SELECT a.id AS id, a.app_code AS appCode, a.app_name AS appName, a.app_type AS appType, a.suite_code AS suiteCode, s.suite_name AS suiteName, a.object_code AS objectCode, o.object_name AS objectName, a.entry_mode AS entryMode, a.entry_url AS entryUrl, a.config_key AS configKey, a.icon AS icon, a.description AS description, a.status AS status, a.sort_order AS sortOrder, a.options AS options, COALESCE(b.binding_count, 0) AS bindingCount, a.create_time AS createTime, a.update_time AS updateTime FROM ai_business_app a LEFT JOIN ai_business_suite s ON s.tenant_id = a.tenant_id AND s.suite_code = a.suite_code LEFT JOIN ai_business_object o ON o.tenant_id = a.tenant_id AND o.suite_code = a.suite_code AND o.object_code = a.object_code LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, target_id, COUNT(1) AS binding_count FROM ai_business_binding WHERE target_type = 'APP' GROUP BY tenant_id, target_id ) b ON b.tenant_id = a.tenant_id AND b.target_id = a.id
mapper.select: ORDER BY a.sort_order ASC, a.id ASC
ORDER BY a.sort_order ASC, a.id ASC

SELECT
FROM ai_business_app WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND suite_code = #{suiteCode} AND object_code = #{objectCode} AND app_type = 'BUSINESS' AND entry_mode = 'RUNTIME' ORDER BY status DESC, CASE WHEN config_key IS NULL OR config_key = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN options IS NOT NULL AND options LIKE '%"menuResourceId"%' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN options IS NOT NULL AND options LIKE '%"runtimeOpenMode"%' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, sort_order ASC, update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM ai_business_app WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND suite_code = #{suiteCode} AND object_code = #{objectCode} AND app_type = 'BUSINESS' AND entry_mode = 'RUNTIME' ORDER BY status DESC, sort_order ASC, update_time DESC, id DESC
